name: Oregon City Coin & Jewelry
description_short: Oregon City Coin & Jewelry buys and sells gold, silver, coins, diamonds, watches, and jewelry in Oregon City, OR. They offer quotes by phone or in-person visits.
description_long:
Oregon City Coin & Jewelry is a coin and precious metals dealer located at 618 Molalla Ave in Oregon City, Oregon. The business operates as a buyer and seller of tangible assets, specializing in numismatic and jewelry transactions. They have been reviewed on multiple platforms with a 3.5-star rating across 15 reviews.

The company's core services include buying and selling gold, silver, jewelry, coins, diamonds, fine watches, dental gold, scrap, bullion, and rare coins. Customers can request quotes by phone at (503) 960-4163 or visit in person during business hours. The business emphasizes accessibility by offering extended hours compared to competitors, remaining open Monday through Friday from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM.

What distinguishes Oregon City Coin & Jewelry is their stated commitment to longer operating hours than typical jewelry shops, addressing a specific customer pain point. Recent positive reviews (2025) highlight straightforward transactions and kind customer service. The business accepts walk-ins and provides same-transaction buying and selling services, appealing to customers seeking convenience in precious metals and jewelry liquidation.

However, the review profile reveals significant concerns. Multiple reviews allege problematic business practices: one customer reported selling counterfeit silver items back to the shop, another alleged poor treatment of a teenage customer, and one review explicitly accused staff of taking advantage of an elderly customer. The negative review distribution (4 one-star, 2 two-star reviews) suggests potential issues with pricing accuracy, ethical conduct, or customer treatment that warrant caution.
pros: Extended business hours (10 AM–4 PM Mon–Fri) compared to many competitors
One-stop buying and selling of multiple asset types (gold, silver, coins, jewelry, watches)
Recent positive reviews (2025) praising straightforward service and kindness
Quoted willingness to accept previously purchased items back
Handles specialty items including rare coins, fine watches, and dental gold
cons: Multiple reviews allege unfair dealing or advantage-taking with vulnerable customers
At least one documented case of customer receiving counterfeit merchandise
Significant negative review concentration (6 of 15 reviews are 1-2 stars)
Explicit allegation of elder financial exploitation with no visible public response
Limited hours (closed weekends and after 4 PM weekdays)
best_for: Customers liquidating small quantities of gold, silver, or jewelry quickly
People seeking convenient walk-in service without appointment scheduling
Buyers of rare coins or specialty numismatic items in the Oregon City area
diagnosis: Oregon City Coin & Jewelry is appropriate for customers seeking quick local liquidity for precious metals and jewelry, but the pattern of negative reviews—particularly allegations of unfair dealing with vulnerable populations—requires caution. Verify pricing independently and consider requesting written quotes before transacting, given the ethical concerns raised in customer feedback.
